sentences.target: Elle fait un malaise dans le métro.
sentences.reading: /ɛl fɛ œ̃ ma.lɛz dɑ̃ lə me.tʁo/

translations.fr: Elle fait un malaise dans le métro.
translations.ipa: /ɛl fɛ œ̃ ma.lɛz dɑ̃ lə me.tʁo/
translations.en: She is having a fainting spell on the subway.
translations.es: Se está desmayando en el metro.
translations.de: Sie bekommt in der U‑Bahn einen Schwächeanfall.
translations.it: Le viene un malore in metropolitana.
translations.pt: Ela está passando mal no metrô.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang ngất xỉu trên tàu điện ngầm.
translations.nl: Ze krijgt een flauwte in de metro.
translations.hi: वह मेट्रो में बेहोश हो रही है.
translations.id: Dia pingsan di kereta bawah tanah.
translations.ja: 彼女は地下鉄で倒れかけている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; takes the direct object 'un malaise' (idiom: 'faire un malaise' = have a fainting spell/feel unwell).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'malaise'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'fait'; denotes a health issue/feeling unwell.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; specifies the following noun.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'dans'; indicates location.

sentences.target: Je sens un malaise depuis ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sɑ̃ œ̃ ma.lɛz də.pɥi sə ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je sens un malaise depuis ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sɑ̃ œ̃ ma.lɛz də.pɥi sə ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: I’ve felt unwell since this morning.
translations.es: Me siento mal desde esta mañana.
translations.de: Ich fühle mich seit heute Morgen unwohl.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从今天早上起就一直不舒服。
translations.yue: 我由今朝開始一直覺得唔舒服。
translations.ru: С утра я чувствую себя плохо.
translations.pt: Estou me sentindo mal desde hoje de manhã.
translations.he: אני לא מרגיש טוב מאז הבוקר.
translations.tr: Bu sabahtan beri kendimi kötü hissediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy không khỏe từ sáng nay.
translations.ar: أشعر أنني لست على ما يرام منذ صباح اليوم.
translations.nl: Ik voel me sinds vanmorgen niet goed.
translations.hu: Ma reggel óta rosszul érzem magam.
translations.hi: मैं आज सुबह से ठीक महसूस नहीं कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Źle się czuję od dzisiejszego rana.
translations.el: Δεν αισθάνομαι καλά από το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg har følt meg uvel siden i morges.
translations.id: Sejak pagi ini aku merasa tidak enak badan.
translations.sv: Jag har känt mig dålig sedan i morse.
translations.ro: Mă simt rău de azi dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg har haft det skidt siden i morges.
translations.fi: Olen voinut huonosti tästä aamusta lähtien.
translations.ja: 今朝から体調が悪いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1sg; selects 'un malaise' as direct object and the temporal PP 'depuis ce matin'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'malaise'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'sens'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'matin'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'depuis' (time expression).

sentences.target: Il y a un malaise dans l'équipe.
sentences.reading: /il i a œ̃ ma.lɛz dɑ̃ le.kip/

translations.fr: Il y a un malaise dans l'équipe.
translations.ipa: /il i a œ̃ ma.lɛz dɑ̃ le.kip/
translations.en: There’s an awkward vibe in the team.
translations.es: Hay mal ambiente en el equipo.
translations.de: Im Team herrscht eine unangenehme Stimmung.
translations.it: C’è un clima di disagio nella squadra.
translations.zh-Hans: 团队里有种尴尬的气氛。
translations.yue: 隊入面有啲尷尬嘅氣氛。
translations.vi: Trong đội có không khí gượng gạo.
translations.nl: Er hangt een ongemakkelijke sfeer in het team.
translations.nb: Det er klein stemning i teamet.
translations.sv: Det är en stel stämning i teamet.
translations.ro: În echipă este o atmosferă stânjenitoare.
translations.da: Der er en akavet stemning på holdet.
translations.ja: チームに気まずい雰囲気がある。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun used here as an expletive subject in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Adverbial clitic pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'il y a'.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; in 'il y a' functions as the existential 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'malaise'.
Common noun, masculine; notional NP in the existential construction (entity asserted to exist).
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, elided before a vowel-initial noun; part of 'dans l'équipe'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Papa a un malaise au supermarché.

translations.fr: Papa a un malaise au supermarché.
translations.en: Dad is feeling faint at the supermarket.
translations.es: Papá se siente mareado en el supermercado.
translations.de: Papa hat im Supermarkt einen Schwächeanfall.
translations.it: Papà ha un malore al supermercato.
translations.zh-Hans: 爸爸在超市里感到头晕。
translations.yue: 爸爸喺超市度覺得頭暈。
translations.pt: Meu pai está passando mal no supermercado.
translations.vi: Bố thấy chóng mặt ở siêu thị.
translations.nl: Papa voelt zich duizelig in de supermarkt.
translations.hi: पापा सुपरमार्केट में चक्कर महसूस कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Tata czuje się słabo w supermarkecie.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς δεν αισθάνεται καλά στο σούπερ μάρκετ.
translations.nb: Pappa føler seg svimmel i supermarkedet.
translations.sv: Pappa känner sig yr i mataffären.
translations.ro: Tata se simte amețit la supermarket.
translations.da: Far føler sig svimmel i supermarkedet.
translations.ja: 父はスーパーでめまいを感じている。

tokens.explanation: Common noun used as a vocative/name; grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; takes 'un malaise' as direct object (idiom: 'avoir un malaise').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces 'malaise'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'a'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'au'; indicates location.

Il y a un malaise dans l'équipe.
Papa a un malaise au supermarché.
